description_long: This butcher shop is a two-story commercial building with a distinctively curved facade and traditional Japanese architectural elements. The exterior features a combination of beige plaster and dark wooden panels, with a tiled awning above the ground floor and a row of red lanterns adorning both levels. The ground floor has a recessed entrance flanked by two vending machines and is bordered by short white walls with wooden posts. A prominent blue vertical sign with white Japanese characters is mounted on the corner, adding to the shop's visibility. The side and rear walls are plain and wooden, while the front is lively with signage, lanterns, and small architectural details. The overall appearance suggests a vibrant, inviting shopfront in an urban Japanese setting.
description: A two-story Japanese-style butcher shop with a curved beige facade, red lanterns, a blue vertical sign, and vending machines at the entrance.
description_view_0: The front-left view shows the curved facade, red lanterns on both floors, the blue vertical sign, and the main entrance area with short walls.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, tall wooden wall with minimal features and no windows or decorations.
description_view_2: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain wooden wall with a glimpse of the awning and lanterns near the front.
description_view_3: The direct front view highlights the main entrance, two vending machines, red lanterns, the blue vertical sign, and the short boundary walls.
attribute_shop_signage: A prominent blue vertical sign with white Japanese characters is mounted on the front corner of the building, above the entrance. The sign is rectangular, illuminated, and styled in a traditional manner. No other visible signage with text or logos is present.
